market_data_input.key_trends: Secteur leader: energy (+23.2% YTD) | Région leader: south-korea (+54.4% YTD) | 1 secteur(s) en refroidissement (3M ≤ -2.0%) | 52W leader: information-technology (+64.6% sur 12 mois) | 6M leader: energy (+27.1% sur 6 mois)
market_data_input.risks: Secteurs en difficulté: financials, communication-services, healthcare | Régions en difficulté: india | Concentration: peu de secteurs en zone favorable (rotation possible)
market_data_input.sector_momentum_summary: consumer-staples(neutral,b=0.25,d=-0.04%), energy(favored,b=0.15,d=0.42%), industrials(neutral,b=0.92,d=-1.22%), materials(neutral,b=0.75,d=-0.84%), financials(neutral,b=0.96,d=-0.15%), consumer-discretionary(neutral,b=1.24,d=-0.04%), communication-services(neutral,b=1.24,d=0.55%), healthcare(neutral,b=0.6,d=-0.83%), real-estate(neutral,b=0.44,d=-1.74%), information-technology(neutral,b=1.44,d=0.07%)

ai_response.regime_rationale: Brent near $100 creates persistent cost-push inflation pressure with PCE at 2.8% (well above target) and breakeven inflation 5Y at 2.61%, while Fed is on hold (0 cuts in 6m) and VIX at 22 signals unease. Growth signals are mixed — equity momentum is positive but narrow (tech/energy only), industrials -1.22% daily, healthcare -0.83%, real-estate -1.74% suggest underlying economic softness beneath the surface.

adjustments.action: Increase energy/oil cap — $99 Brent + energy sector leader +23.2% YTD + RADAR favored
adjustments.rationale: Brent near $100 with energy as RADAR-favored sector and 6M leader (+27.1%); energy is the canonical stagflation hedge and benefits from supply constraints.

adjustments.action: Increase precious metals cap — gold at $4708 despite 11.7% drawdown signals structural demand
adjustments.rationale: Gold at $4700+ even after 11.7% drawdown from ATH reflects massive structural bid (central bank buying, de-dollarization); silver at $76 confirms precious metals supercycle — stagflation regime demands real asset exposure.

adjustments.action: Reduce AI/semi cap — high-beta tech vulnerable if inflation forces Fed hawkish pivot
adjustments.rationale: IT has 52W leadership (+64.6%) but beta 1.44 makes it vulnerable to any hawkish repricing; PCE 2.8% + Brent $99 = second-order risk that Fed pivots hawkish, crushing duration-sensitive growth.

adjustments.action: Increase dividend/value cap — defensive quality outperforms in stagflation
adjustments.rationale: Consumer staples (beta 0.25) and utilities (RADAR favored, beta 0.44) provide inflation pass-through and income in a stagflationary environment where growth disappoints.
Gold is the premier stagflation hedge; $4700 price level with 11.7% drawdown offers better entry than ATH, and weak dollar (DTWEXBGS 118 < 120 threshold) supports gold.

adjustments.action: Prefer TIPS, shorten duration, avoid HY — stagflation playbook
adjustments.rationale: PCE 2.8% + breakeven 2.61% + Brent $99 = inflation persistence; TIPS protect real purchasing power while short duration limits damage if Fed is forced to hike.

adjustments.action: Increase bond floor for Stable — defensive posture in stagflation
adjustments.rationale: Stable profile at 36.3% bonds needs more ballast; increasing floor ensures adequate protection via short-duration TIPS and treasuries as equity risk rises.

adjustments.action: Increase healthcare cap — defensive with inelastic demand
adjustments.rationale: Healthcare is down near-term (daily -0.83%) creating entry opportunity; sector has pricing power and inelastic demand that outperforms in stagflation despite RADAR showing it in difficulty.

bond_strategy.regime_summary: Stagflation demands TIPS for inflation protection, short duration (<4y) to limit rate risk if Fed forced to act, and avoidance of HY credit where defaults rise as growth weakens.

cash_allocation.rationale: VIX at 22 with stagflation uncertainty warrants modest cash buffer for buying opportunities on any vol spike; not excessive since T-bills (CLTL, GBIL) already serve as productive cash at ~4% yield.

ai_response._cash_guidance: MINIMUM CASH: Agressif 2% if VIX>20 (option d'achat sur la vol), Modéré 3%, Stable 0% (T-bills = cash productif). Le cash est une POSITION, pas une absence de position.

crypto_allocation.rationale: Crypto is a risk asset that correlates with liquidity; stagflation = tight liquidity + uncertain growth = reduce crypto caps significantly. BTC has some digital gold narrative but not enough to justify full allocation.

warnings: Brent at $99 — a break above $105 would escalate stagflation to risk_off/crisis as energy shock cascades through CPI and consumer spending
Fed on hold at 3.64% with PCE 2.8% — if next CPI prints hot, market will reprice hikes and duration assets will sell off sharply
Gold 11.7% off ATH — could signal either healthy consolidation or early risk-off rotation; watch for break below $4400 as regime change signal
IG spreads at 135bps with LQD down -0.40% today — credit is weakening; if IG breaks 160bps, upgrade to risk_off
Real estate sector -1.74% daily — commercial real estate stress could be a canary for broader credit deterioration
India flagged as RADAR-avoided region — monitor for EM contagion if dollar strengthens from current weak level
